channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump warns U.S. would 'decimate and destroy' Iran over assassination threat
item.description: President Donald Trump said on Truth Social that 1,000 missiles are ready if Iran follows through on assassination threats against him.

item.title: Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool drained again as Trump administration resumes repairs
item.description: Workers began draining the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool on Friday to remove fireworks debris and fix damage that the Trump administration attributed to vandalism.

item.title: ICE detains 28 in southern Indiana sweep
item.description: Immigration and Customs Enforcement arrested at least 28 people during a sweep operation in southern Indiana this week.

item.title: America's cheapest city for a cheeseburger, fries and soda may surprise you
item.description: DoorDash's Cheeseburger Index shows a burger, fries and soda costs $12.94 in Austin but $28.28 in Anchorage, highlighting stark local price differences.
